# UC-17.5.15 · Forcepoint Policy Sync Status Between Cloud SSE and On-Prem Web (`forcepoint:one`)

## Description

Split-brain policies confuse users and create audit gaps between legacy web proxies and ONE.

## Value

Ensures unified enforcement story across hybrid deployments.

## Implementation

Install the Insights SIEM app, configure HEC inputs per product line, and align indexes (`proxy`, `email`, `dlp`, `sase`). Normalize usernames to enterprise SAMAccountName.

## SPL

```spl
index=sase sourcetype="forcepoint:one" OR index=proxy sourcetype="websense:cg:kv" earliest=-24h
| eval plane=if(sourcetype=="forcepoint:one","cloud","onprem")
| where match(_raw,"(?i)sync|publish|revision")
| stats latest(_time) as t by plane, policy_name
| eventstats max(t) as newest
| eval lag_sec=newest-t
| where lag_sec>3600
```

## CIM SPL

```spl
| tstats `summariesonly` count
  from datamodel=Email.Email
  by Email.user, Email.action, Email.src, Email.dest span=1h
| sort - count
```

## Visualization

Table (plane, policy, lag), alert.
